templates.title: Prime Beggar
templates.prompt: Successfully beg for {{count}} Twitch Prime sub{{plural:count:s}}.

templates.title: Back to Preschool
templates.prompt: Sing a full nursery rhyme.

templates.title: The Zoomer
templates.prompt: Do {{count}} 6-7s in a row on camera without messing up.

templates.title: Eat Fresh
templates.prompt: Order a Subway sandwich live on stream.

templates.title: Social Obligation
templates.prompt: Phone a friend and tell them you are only calling because a quest told you to.

templates.title: Hydro Homie
templates.prompt: Chug a full cup of water in one go.

templates.title: Chat's Personal Trainer
templates.prompt: Do {{count}} pushup{{plural:count:s}} on camera.

templates.title: Locked In
templates.prompt: Spend {{hours}} hour{{plural:hours:s}} playing a single videogame.

templates.title: Degenerate Behavior
templates.prompt: Watch a V-Tuber stream on Twitch for {{minutes}} minute{{plural:minutes:s}}.

templates.title: The Prophet
templates.prompt: Visit a stream with {{viewers}} viewer{{plural:viewers:s}} and tell them you are on a quest.

templates.title: Cardio King
templates.prompt: Do {{count}} jumping jack{{plural:count:s}}.

templates.title: Stereotype Andy
templates.prompt: Do a bad Chinese accent for the next {{minutes}} minute{{plural:minutes:s}}.

templates.title: Soul Gazer
templates.prompt: Stare directly into the camera without blinking for 30 seconds.

templates.title: Kill with Kindness
templates.prompt: Give {{chatter}} a genuine, heartfelt compliment.

templates.title: Self-Reflection
templates.prompt: Look in a mirror (or your webcam) and roast yourself for 30 seconds.

templates.title: ASMR Streamer
templates.prompt: Speak only in a whisper for the next 5 minutes.

templates.title: Perfect Balance
templates.prompt: Balance a household object on your head for 1 minute while streaming.

templates.title: Clean your room
templates.prompt: Show your desktop icons and let chat judge you.

templates.title: The Voice
templates.prompt: Sing 1 minute of a song chosen by {{chatter}}.

templates.title: Core Strength
templates.prompt: Hold a plank for {{seconds}} seconds.

templates.title: Clout Chaser
templates.prompt: Post 'I am a little stinky boy' on Twitter/X right now.

templates.title: Wim Hof Method
templates.prompt: Splash your face with ice cold water.

templates.title: Crack open a cold one
templates.prompt: Chug a can of beer.

templates.title: Blind Typist
templates.prompt: Type 'The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog' with your eyes closed.

templates.title: Power Trip
templates.prompt: VIP {{chatter}} then immediately remove it 10 seconds later.

templates.title: MS Paint Prodigy
templates.prompt: Draw a portrait of {{chatter}} in MS Paint.

templates.title: Ninja Skills
templates.prompt: Do a standing high-kick above your waist height.

templates.title: Vocabulary Restraint
templates.prompt: Do not say the word 'the' for the next 3 minutes.

templates.title: Vertigo
templates.prompt: Spin in place {{count}} times then try to walk in a straight line.

templates.title: Sell Out
templates.prompt: Do a 1-minute improvised ad read for a product of your choice

templates.title: Is the stream frozen?
templates.prompt: Don't move or speak for 60 seconds straight.

templates.title: Old School Internet
templates.prompt: Put your shoe on your head for 30 seconds.

templates.title: Community Service
templates.prompt: Thank every person who has spoken in chat in the last 2 minutes by name.

templates.title: Dad Jokes
templates.prompt: Tell a joke so bad that {{chatter}} says '-2' in chat.

templates.title: Good Jokes
templates.prompt: Tell a joke so good that {{chatter}} says '+2' in chat.

templates.title: Lonely Streamer
templates.prompt: Give your viewers(camera) a 10 second hug.

templates.title: Emotional Rollercoaster
templates.prompt: Compliment {{chatter}}, then roast them, then compliment them again.
